title: The Integration Threshold
excerpt: Enterprises do not choose to cross the integration threshold. They discover they already have. Five signals describe five mechanisms by which AI becomes operationally irreversible — before anyone notices.

title: The Wrapper Purge Begins
excerpt: Five signals. One pattern. The AI industry transitions from expansion to consolidation, from hype to integration, from optional to load-bearing. The dependency architecture deepens — and the foundations are being poured into everything.
